Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This cat looks very weak. It seems[n]like it might be hungry...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should give it {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's mewing very weakly. Maybe it's hungry...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But I don't have anything it can eat...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I can buy cat food somewhere...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The cat is purring loudly. It seems happy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe the cat will feel better if I come[n]back and feed it again tomorrow...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The cat is purring loudly. It seems happy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Its purring seems more[n]energetic than it did last time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe the cat will feel even better if[n]I come back and feed it again tomorrow...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The cat is purring loudly. It seems happy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The light in its eyes has returned.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe the cat will feel even better if[n]I come back and feed it again tomorrow...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The cat is purring loudly. It seems happy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}And it seems to have regained all[n]its energy by eating the cat food.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I think it'll be okay without me[n]having to feed it anymore.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The cat seems to have regained all[n]its energy by eating the cat food.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It also seems to have grown...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I think it'll be okay without me[n]having to feed it anymore.[n]{f 1 1}
